name: Kevin Warnock
title: Senior Software Engineer
summary: Seasoned Senior Software Engineer with proven expertise leading cross-functional teams and architecting scalable solutions for major clients. Demonstrated success deploying integration engines, mentoring junior developers, and delivering production features at organizations such as Capital One and the Federal Reserve Bank. Adept at full-stack development, cloud infrastructure, and AI-assisted workflows.

bullets: Architected and deployed QA and staging environments on AWS using ECS + Fargate, fully managed through Terraform, enabling reliable environment parity and streamlined deployment workflows
Designed and implemented an integration engine responsible for synchronizing data across 8 external provider systems, supporting automated ingestion, normalization, and processing pipelines
Built internal administrative tooling to trigger, monitor, and manage synchronization jobs, improving operational visibility and reducing manual intervention
Extended the frontend application to support new data models and entities introduced through external integrations, ensuring consistent user experience
Developed monitoring and operational controls around background sync processes, improving reliability and enabling rapid debugging of integration failures
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to ensure integration data consistency across backend services and UI layers

Architected and implemented a Bloomreach CMS integration for Audacy, enabling dynamic content delivery powering web and mobile application experiences for the largest radio content platform in the United States
Designed scalable content models and API-driven delivery patterns to support flexible editorial workflows and high-volume digital publishing

Developed a custom CMS extension using React that added an Elasticsearch query builder interface within the Bloomreach CMS UI, allowing non-technical users to construct complex search queries through a structured visual interface
Built integration layers connecting Bloomreach content APIs, Elasticsearch search infrastructure, and downstream application clients to ensure performant and reliable content retrieval
Collaborated with engineering and product stakeholders to translate business requirements into scalable CMS architecture and integration strategies

Promoted from Senior Software Engineer to Software Solutions Architect after successful Audacy implementation, expanding responsibilities to overseeing architecture and integration strategy across multiple client engagements
Provided architectural leadership on system design, integration patterns, and platform extensibility to ensure maintainable and scalable solutions across projects
Led Angular development initiative as Subject Matter Expert and primary point-of-contact, driving project success
Trained and mentored junior developers in Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript, SCSS, HTML, Java, and PL/SQL, improving overall team performance
Developed new vertically sliced features across the full stack, enhancing application functionality
Created proofs of concept for innovative new solutions, accelerating project innovation
Designed and developed forward-thinking systems that meet user needs and improve productivity
Collaborated with cross-functional team members to analyze potential system solutions based on evolving client requirements
Fixed all unit tests and acceptance tests within each code base contributed to, ensuring code reliability
Developed Dashboard and Job Scheduling functionality, enhancing system usability
Decomposed large components into smaller, more manageable components, improving maintainability
Fixed all unit tests and acceptance tests within the code base, ensuring software reliability
Collaborated with business and stakeholders to obtain requirements, aligning solutions with business needs
Migrated application from Angular 9 to Angular 10, modernizing the technology stack
Improved system performance by making proactive adjustments and resolving bugs
Estimated work hours and tracked progress using Scrum methodology
Delivered production features and innovative solutions enabling Capital One to migrate from legacy systems to new systems while ensuring continuous feature delivery during migrations
Developed internal tools to enhance day-to-day operations (CI pipeline on Jenkins, GitHub webhooks, custom cache busting solution, custom ts-lint rules), improving developer productivity
Trained and mentored junior developers in object-oriented programming design patterns using NodeJS, Angular, TypeScript, Java, and Groovy, improving overall productivity and code quality
Migrated a large enterprise application from AngularJS v1.3 to Angular 8, modernizing the platform
Troubleshot enterprise production systems, ensuring high system availability
Worked with project managers, developers, QA, and customers to resolve technical issues
Contracted by Capital One to build new features, set application design patterns, establish best practices, and optimize their web application
Troubleshot production and pre-production enterprise application bugs and performance problems, improving system stability
Developed processes and tools to enhance day-to-day development, increasing team efficiency
Set patterns and best practices for acceptance testing, improving software quality
Built internal digital library for the Army Training Support Center (ATSC) using AngularJS, HTML, CSS, and Java, improving information accessibility
Researched, tested, built, and integrated enhancements based on client requirements, ensuring tailored solutions
Designed, developed, and optimized web applications using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript
Built internal digital library for ATSC using AngularJS, HTML, CSS, and Java, enhancing digital resource management
Designed, developed, and optimized web and hybrid applications using Cordova, expanding platform compatibility
Developed processes, tools, and best practices to enhance development workflow
Maintained and enhanced internal ATSC applications through coding changes and database maintenance, ensuring system reliability
Released one of the largest improvements in over three years to AutoDB, a frequently used application for Mission Support and the help desk
Identified, diagnosed, and resolved software and hardware issues, improving user satisfaction
Built strong working relationships with customers to resolve technical issues efficiently
Created batch files, PowerShell scripts, and VBScript scripts to simplify day-to-day operations

projects.name: Game Developer (AKGames)
projects.description: Published Flippy Boi on the Android Play Store (US & UK) using Phaser 3 + Capacitor. Managed the full release pipeline including builds, store submission, and advertising integration. Currently developing additional titles in Unity.

projects.name: Author (AKWarnock)
projects.description: Co-authored The Spirit Blessed Chronicles: A New Legacy, collaborating on worldbuilding, character design, and the independent publishing process.

projects.name: Podcast Host
projects.description: Hosted and produced an independent podcast discussing culture, technology, and unconventional ideas. Managed the full production workflow from planning through distribution.

education.details: Member of Phi Theta Kappa · Majored in Programming

education.degree: Associate of Applied Science: Occupational Science
